texto: As he spoke, the wind whistled through the gaps in his teeth, creating an odd musical accompaniment to his words. -- unpublished as of Jan 11 2016, but surely due to appear in one of my works eventually.
explicacao: Citação de Kira Stone sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “As he spoke, the wind whistled through the gaps in his teeth, creating an odd musical accompanime…” articula reflexao, humorous, spoke em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e reflexao.
